adapter__op_c_memory__prev_value__0__0 - c__0__0 = 0

b__0__3 - (adapter__op_b_memory__prev_value__0__3 * (1 - (is_divw + is_remw + is_divuw + is_remuw)) + b_neg * (is_divw + is_remw + is_divuw + is_remuw) * 65535) = 0

(is_divw + is_remw) * (is_divw + is_remw - 1) = 0

c_times_quotient_lower__b_sign_extend - (0 + 0) * c_times_quotient_lower__b_msb = 0
c_times_quotient_lower__c_sign_extend - 0 * c_times_quotient_lower__c_msb = 0
is_real * (c_times_quotient_lower__product__0 - (0 + c_times_quotient_lower__b_lower_byte__low_bytes__0 * c_times_quotient_lower__c_lower_byte__low_bytes__0 - c_times_quotient_lower__carry__0 * 256)) = 0
